commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] This external PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer review, not an automated code repair.; Cleared: The diff only changes TypeScript source and tests under agent auth/fallback code, with no workflow, dependency, lockfile, secret, install, or supply-chain surface changed. (sha=78ddcb5bdc61030285dc9baed100e74c184aa949)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes model fallback and attempt execution so configured CLI agent runtimes skip stale OpenClaw provider auth cooldown/profile auto-resolution, with regression tests for `claude-cli` and `codex-cli` shapes.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +69. Total +75 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main computes a configured CLI runtime but still returns `skipsProviderAuthCooldown: false`, so stale provider auth cooldown can stop `runWithModelFallback` before the run callback. I did not run the failing path because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This external PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer review, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(agents): skip auth gate for CLI-owned transport
target.body:
### Summary
- Skip the model-fallback auth cooldown gate for explicitly configured CLI agent runtimes such as `anthropic/*` with `agentRuntime.id: "claude-cli"`.
- Keep the attempt-level auth-profile selection guard so CLI-owned transports preserve only `authProfileProvider` when auth-profile forwarding is disabled.

### What changed after review
- Rebased onto current `main`.
- Added the fallback-boundary fix requested by review: CLI runtime candidates now set `skipsProviderAuthCooldown: true` before the fallback loop evaluates stale OpenClaw provider auth state.
- Added production-path coverage through `runWithModelFallback` with `anthropic/*`, `claude-cli`, and stale provider auth state.
- Kept the direct `runAgentAttempt` coverage showing `authProfileId` stays unset while the CLI-owned route still runs.

### Real behavior proof
After-fix evidence from the live OpenClaw PR branch at `78ddcb5bdc61030285dc9baed100e74c184aa949`:

```text
$ gh pr checks 88551 -R openclaw/openclaw
Real behavior proof  pass  11s
check-prod-types     pass  55s
check-test-types     pass  1m20s
checks-node-agentic-agents-core-auth     pass  57s
checks-node-agentic-agents-core-runtime  pass  1m22s
checks-node-agentic-cli                  pass  1m9s
checks-node-auto-reply-reply-agent-runner pass 1m3s
```

The after-fix branch includes a production-path regression for the CLI-owned transport shape: `runWithModelFallback` enters the run callback for `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6` with `agentRuntime.id: "claude-cli"` even when `anthropic:default` is disabled in OpenClaw auth state. The direct attempt coverage also shows the `codex-cli` route still runs with `authProfileId` unset when auth-profile forwarding is disabled.

### Verification
- PR CI covers the touched model-fallback and CLI attempt execution suites.
- The diff exercises both layers called out in review: the fallback pre-attempt auth gate and the downstream attempt auth-profile selection.
target.author: yu-xin-c

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
